project.name: Managed Postgres Parent
project.description: Parent reactor for managed PostgreSQL lifecycle libraries.

requireProperty.message: Run API compatibility with -Djapicmp.oldVersion=<released-version> after installing or resolving the baseline artifacts.

fail.message: Static analysis violations were collected. See checkstyle-result.xml, pmd.xml, cpd.xml, and spotbugsXml.xml under ${project.build.directory}.
Release artifact audit failed for ${project.artifactId}: missing main jar ${project.build.finalName}.jar.
Release artifact audit failed for ${project.artifactId}: missing source jar ${project.build.finalName}-sources.jar.
Release artifact audit failed for ${project.artifactId}: missing Javadoc jar ${project.build.finalName}-javadoc.jar.
Release artifact audit failed for ${project.artifactId}: main jar does not contain META-INF/LICENSE.
Release artifact audit failed for ${project.artifactId}: main jar does not contain META-INF/NOTICE.
Release artifact audit failed for ${project.artifactId}: main jar does not contain META-INF/THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.
